creator: Martin.Birgmeier@aon.at
text:
french/kde4-l10n (fr-kde-l10n-4.5.3) fails to compile; the bug is due to a missing translator/reviewer entity in kdelibs4, as seen by running the following command:

svn diff svn://anonsvn.kde.org/home/kde/tags/KDE/4.5.3/kdelibs/kdoctools/customization/fr/user.entities@1193390 svn://anonsvn.kde.org/home/kde/trunk/KDE/kdelibs/kdoctools/customization/fr/user.entities@1193390

Fix: add the attached file as /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs4/files/patch-kdoctools_customization_fr_user.entities

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: try compiling french/kde4-l10n
